steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage asserts forest regrowth by the mid-1980s due to environmental reforms and falling meat prices. The blank must point to evidence of recovery in that timeframe.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Choice B captures the regrowth by referencing an increase in forest cover area from 1979 to 2000, spanning the mid-1980s recovery. A, C, and D either describe declines (C), compare unrelated timeframes (A), or highlight similarity without growth (D). That matches choice B — B is correct.
